action.reasoning: Observation: First iteration, empty workspace, domain generalization task with camera trap images (10 classes, imbalanced). Analysis: Need baseline pipeline validation + time measurement per instructions; start with simple pretrained ResNet50 (torchvision) fine-tuned for 2 epochs on source domains to avoid long runs. Decision: Implement custom Dataset for txt-based data, training script with metric logging to logs/iter_0/metrics.jsonl, save checkpoint, and predict.py; run short train then submit_eval immediately.
